body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. default-suite worker-loop tests must not invoke host-wide process discovery","coverage":"Child 1 AC1"},{"parent_ac":"2. named default-suite fixtures must use the bounded seam while preserving queue assertions","coverage":"Child 2 AC1 and Child 2 AC2"},{"parent_ac":"3. Linux real-process coverage in TestWorkStartupReaper_KillsOrphanProcessGroup and sibling orphan-reaper tests must still exercise production behavior","coverage":"Child 3 AC1"},{"parent_ac":"4. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test -race ./internal/agent -run '^(TestExecuteLoop_StartupOrphanReaperUsesInjectedScanner|TestExecuteLoop_TwoWorkersBothClaimP0sBeforeP2s(_UsesHermeticProcessScanner)?|TestExecuteBeadWorkerEndToEndThreeBeadDrain(_UsesHermeticProcessScanner)?|TestWorkStartupReaper_KillsOrphanProcessGroup)$' -count=1 -timeout 60s must pass","coverage":"Child 3 AC2"},{"parent_ac":"5. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test -short -race -timeout 30m ./internal/agent must pass without default worker-loop fixtures invoking the production /proc scanner","coverage":"Child 3 AC3"},{"parent_ac":"6. lefthook run pre-commit must pass","coverage":"Child 1 AC3, Child 2 AC4, and Child 3 AC4"}],"child_ids":["ddx-02200b1e","ddx-d9caa6fc","ddx-5011e1a8"],"rationale":"Split the host-scan regression into a seam, fixture migration, and end-to-end guard so each child can land and verify independently without forcing the entire fix through one oversized bead."}

summary: closed as dead-intermediate bead (all children closed, execution-eligible=false)
